g.text: epicd — Work-item lifecycle (phases; turn = actor(phase); lane = pipeline_id)
surfaced via Coordinator runtime-fact — NOT a phase.
ready & in-progress are the SAME phase
queued vs active. Primitive: worker implements → engine.complete()
→ adjudicate DoD (ENG-8); worker may NOT self-write done.
— only (pipeline_id, phase) are STORED per task:
lane = pipeline_id (field) · phase = this diagram (bare name) ·
from pipeline-data (NOT a field) · claim = runtime.
Colour: blue = actor:machine · green = actor:human (your turn) · grey = actor:none.
live claim ⇒ 🤖 active · no claim ⇒ ⏳ queued · stale claim ⇒ ⚠️ orphaned.
actor=human ⇒ 👤 your turn. monitor picks up ONLY actor=machine phases.
derived from tree (ADR-011 D-1.1): leaf ⇒ primitive (Basic),
has children ⇒ compound (Epic). Decomposing flips primitive→compound.
role / turn / status all DERIVED; status = label(role, phase) for display.
